theme: electric buses charging overnight in blocking rows
title: Night Depot LIFO
strategies: balanced arrival-order parking + earliest-possible charging (checker baseline)
departure-bucket rows + per-bus cheapest-hours EDF charging (recipe; manufactures blocking pairs when arrivals anti-correlate with departures)

layout-as-data-structure: depth-capped patience sorting fills each row in departure-nondecreasing order so FIFO exit physics reproduces the departure permutation with zero shunts, jointly with cheapest-feasible-hour deadline charging
